title: Uni's Cursed Pack
body:
# questions
## version
- tested on 1.21 only, i think it should work on 1.17 and above
## features
- custom hotbar
  - vsauce
- custom inventory
  - it's a random cat
- custom splash text
  - i got some ideas from a popular discord server
- custom logo
- troll blocks
  - grass, dirt and an ore
- i forgor
## can i use it daily
it is not very practical but go ahead if you do want to

<details>
<summary>disclaimer</summary>
this does not contain uni i named it after my very anonymous identity on the internet
</details>
